ticket_title: Add Datadog Unified Service Tags to all RTGO Metrics

test_cases.name: TC-1: Metrics appear with the correct service name in the monitoring dashboard [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: RT Platform deployed to a QA or UAT environment with monitoring configured. | Test Data: Any active flow that triggers metrics (e.g. an activation or refill); target service: rt-platform-api

steps.action: Trigger any standard flow (activation, payment, or refill) in the target environment.
Open the monitoring dashboard and search for metrics from the current deployment.
Inspect the service label on the emitted metrics.
steps.expected: All metrics show service = rt-platform-api on the monitoring dashboard.

test_cases.name: TC-2: Environment label on metrics matches the deployment environment [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: RT Platform deployed to at least two environments (e.g. QA and UAT). | Test Data: Same flow triggered in QA and UAT separately.

steps.action: Trigger a standard flow in the QA environment and observe the emitted metrics.
Compare the environment label on metrics from each deployment.
steps.expected: QA metrics show env = qa; UAT metrics show env = uat. Labels do not cross between environments.

test_cases.name: TC-3: Version label on metrics reflects the deployed version after a new release [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: A new version of the RT Platform has been deployed to a test environment. | Test Data: Any active flow; known deployed version ID.

steps.action: Note the current version deployed to the environment.
Trigger a standard flow and check the version label on the emitted metrics.
Deploy a new version and repeat.
steps.expected: The version label updates to reflect the new deployment version. Previous version label no longer appears after the new deployment.

test_cases.name: TC-4: Monitoring dashboard allows navigation from a metric to its associated activity logs [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: RT Platform deployed to a monitored environment; Datadog monitoring configured with UST. | Test Data: Any flow that produces metrics and logs (e.g. activation).

steps.action: Open the monitoring dashboard and locate a metric emitted during an activation flow.
Use the drilldown feature on that metric.
Verify that associated log entries and activity traces are reachable from the metric.
steps.expected: Clicking through from the metric surface navigates to the related log spans and traces for the same event.
